Show Controls
Activate
Settings
Profile

Layered Glass Effects

This version implements a two-tiered glass system. The main menu panel acts as a base layer of glass with a very subtle refraction that primarily distorts its rounded edges. The buttons and slider thumbs on top are thicker "lenses" with a much stronger, more pronounced liquid distortion effect. This creates a clear visual hierarchy and a realistic sense of depth.
